metadata.title: amadis — manuscript annotation
metadata.description: Annotate Old French manuscripts across linguistic layers.

hero.heading: Annotate the manuscript, layer by layer.
hero.lede: amadis is a reading room for Old French texts. Transcribe a folio, attach its scan, then gloss any word or passage across parts of speech, lemmas, morphology and meaning — each layer its own colour, stacked beneath the line.
